title: mentha undulata
intro: Mentha undulata, also known as wrinkled mint or curled mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, characterized by its wrinkled leaves and pink or purple flowers. The plant is rich in essential oils, which exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, contributing to its medicinal value. Mentha undulata is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its ability to ease nausea, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its health benefits.
